header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

header:
<js>
(()=>{
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
		sessionID = data.sessionID
	} catch (err){
		data = {}
		sessionID = "";
	}
	if(!sessionID){
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for(i=0;i<26;i++){
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie":"PHPSESSID="+sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; U; Android 8.1.0; zh-CN; MI 8 Lite Build/OPM1.171019.019) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/78.0.3904.108 UCBrowser/13.2.0.1100 Mobile Safari/537.36"
	})
})()
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
(() => {
    let html = java.ajax("https://bbxxxx.com/"); 
    
    // 阅读 App 在执行发现页 JS 时，可以直接通过变量 page 获取当前页码
    // 如果 page 未定义，默认设为 1
    let p = (typeof page !== 'undefined') ? page : 1;

    const getUrl = (baseUrl) => {
        // 第一页保持原样，后续页码拼接 {{page}}.html
        // 注意：这里直接返回字符串结果，避免在字符串内部嵌套引号
        return p == 1 ? baseUrl : baseUrl + p + ".html";
    };

    let list = [
        { "title": "最新", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/new/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "热门", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/hot/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "完本", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/complete/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }
    ];

    let reg1 = /<a href="(\/category\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;

    while ((match1 = reg1.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match1[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match1[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" +  ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }

    // 标签
    list.push({ "title": "标签", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg = /<a href="(\/tag\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match;
    while ((match = reg.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" + ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }
    
    return JSON.stringify(list);
})()
</js>

 java.toast('当前为小说模式🧾'); 
 var data = [];

var n = src.match(/catalog_ul[^\(]+.*-n.*(\d+)\)/) ? parseInt(src.match(/catalog_ul[^\(]+.*-n.*(\d+)\)/)[1]) : 0;
var m = list.length;
var k = /menu/.test(list) && /展开章节/.test(list) ? 1 : 0;
//java.log(n+'/'+m+'/'+k);
for (i in list) {
    if (i >= m - n - k) {break}

    data.push({
        title: String(list_i.text()).replace(book.name, "").replace(/^\s+|\snew/g, ""),
        link: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? "" : `${getUrl()}${list[i].select("a").attr("href")}`,
        time: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0])  ? "" : String(list[i].select("span").text()).replace(/游客/g,'✨').replace(/币/g,'💰').replace(/new\s/g,''),
        vol: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false,
        vip: /币/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false
    });
}
data;
 }else if (baseUrl.match(/comic/)) {

 java.toast('当前为漫画模式🧾'); 
 var data=[]
var list = java.getElements(".catalog_ul li");

var k = /menu/.test(list) && /展开章节/.test(list) ? 1 : 0;

for (i in list) {
    if (i >= m - n - k) {break}

    data.push({

        vol: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false,

    });
}
data;

  var data = []

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var url = getUrl().replace(/\/$/,'')
//java.log(url)
//处理强制登录
var nn = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
var coks = nn.split('; '); 
ckk = coks.filter(item => !item 
.startsWith("lf_reader_num")).join('; ');
cookie.setCookie(url,ckk);

//自动处理验证
let html = src;

function txt(sr) {
    let text;
    if (src.includes("滑动验证")) {
        let headers = {
             'User-Agent': "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/58.0.3029.110 Safari/537.36",
            "Referer": baseUrl
        };
        try {
            let s = src.match(/src=\"(\/huadong[^"]+)/)[1];
            let sr = java.get(url + s, headers).body()
            eval(sr.match(/(key=\".+?,value=\"[^;]+?\;)/)[1]);
            let va = getval(value);
            let codeul = url + sr.match(/([^"]+yanzheng_huadong\.php[^"]+)/)[1] + `${key}&value=${va}`;
            let ck = java.get(codeul, headers);
            java.log("验证Cookie：" + JSON.stringify(ck.cookies()));
            java.toast("检测到验证,尝试自动处理……");
            let tx = java.ajax(baseUrl);
            html = tx;
            text = java.getString('.read-content@html', tx);
        } catch (error) {
            java.log(error);
            text = "自动验证失败，请重试!";
        }
    } else {
        text = java.getString('.read-content@html', src);
    }
    return text;
}

let text = txt(html);

//处理重新获取文本时可能会出现的错误。
let retryCount = 0;
const maxRetries = 3;
let result;
while (retryCount < maxRetries) {
    if (text != false && text !== "") {
        result = text;
        break;
    } else {
        retryCount++;
        text = txt(html);
        Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep(400);
        java.toast(`未获取到文本，正在重试...（当前第${retryCount}次重试）`);
    }
}

if (retryCount === maxRetries) {
    result = "重试三次仍然未获取到文本，请检查网络状况。"
}
result;
</js>

<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

<js>
let sleep = Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep;
let tim = Math.floor(Math.random()*401);
sleep(600-tim);
if (baseUrl.match(/http/)){

}

bookSourceComment:
2026.3.27日更新：
移除解析国外域名，墙太多了
替换稳定国内解析


❤️‍🔥登录必看❤️‍🔥
1.输入邮箱密码后必须点✓保存生效，
否则读取不到输入的账号密码
2.跳转卡顿在设置→其他设置中清除WebView缓存

🔔适配兼容
IOS仅适配:源阅,用心读书

🔥注：阅读请使用最新测试版
1.所有源站每20秒最多12章，把预下载调到0-3之间使用
💯[打赏VIP无请求限制,专属书源]
2.自定义源站示例：番茄小说,七猫小说  多个源站用英文,号分隔
源站名参考 登录URL //书源配置列表 v参数
3.源站带有❇️图标表示只能指定或@搜索

4.搜索模式：
书名@来源 多个来源用英文,号分隔
示例： 
系统@番茄小说，多个源站使用英文,号分隔
书名@类型 返回对应类型所有源站数据，可直接使用@方式搜索或者点击登陆切换模式
示例： 
系统@小说  听书  漫画  短剧等
默认书名排序
指定作者优先：
作者名@作者   作者名@作者,源站
exploreUrl:
<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);
    push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
      {id: 1014, name: "都市高武"},
      {id: 273, name: "历史古代"},
      {id: 27, name: "战神赘婿"},
      {id: 263, name: "都市种田"},
      {id: 258, name: "传统玄幻"},
      {id: 272, name: "历史脑洞"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 262, name: "都市脑洞"},
      {id: 257, name: "玄幻脑洞"},
      {id: 751, name: "悬疑灵异"},
      {id: 504, name: "抗战谍战"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 718, name: "动漫衍生"},
      {id: 1016, name: "男频衍生"}
    ] : [
      {id: 1139, name: "古风世情"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 1015, name: "女频衍生"},
      {id: 248, name: "玄幻言情"},
      {id: 23, name: "种田"},
      {id: 79, name: "年代"},
      {id: 267, name: "现言脑洞"},
      {id: 246, name: "宫斗宅斗"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 253, name: "古言脑洞"},
      {id: 24, name: "快穿"},
      {id: 749, name: "青春甜宠"},
      {id: 745, name: "星光璀璨"},
      {id: 747, name: "女频悬疑"},
      {id: 750, name: "职场婚恋"},
      {id: 748, name: "豪门总裁"},
      {id: 1017, name: "民国言情"}
    ];
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}阅读榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}新书榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=1`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
  });

  let fqCategoryArr = [];
showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];

showCategories.forEach(i => {
  try {
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`${getServerHost()}/type_style?new_category_tab=${i}`));
    let categoryGroups = response.data;
    
    categoryGroups.forEach(group => {
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj(`❤️${group.name}❤️`, null, 1));
      
      group.data.forEach(category => {
        let gender, genre_type;
        if (i == 0) {
          gender = 0;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else if (i == 1) {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        }
        
        fqCategoryArr.push({
          title: category.name,
          url: `${getServerHost()}/type_style?category_id=${category.category_id}&genre_type=${genre_type}&gender=${gender}&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&selected_items=`,
          style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
          }
        });
      });
    });
  } catch (e) {
    fqCategoryArr.push(obj("分类加载失败，请重试", null, 1));
  }
});

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
    if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
      push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
    } else {
      sort.push({
        title: item.title,
        url: item.url,
        style: {
          layout_flexGrow: 1,
          layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
        }
      });
    }
  });

  let hasValidSession = false;
  let username = "";

  try {
    let uinfo = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_user?session=" + getSessionId());
    uinfo = JSON.parse(uinfo);
    
    if (uinfo.data.name) {
      username = uinfo.data.name;
      hasValidSession = true;
    }
  } catch (e) {
  }

  if (!hasValidSession) {
    java.toast("番茄登录已过期，请重新登录");
  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android'
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': "sessionid=" + session
        }
    }))
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response)
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    }
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data
    }
    return finalResult
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
          urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    result = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {source: res.source, url: res.url, name: res.name, tab: res.tab || "novel"};

showTabTips(catalog);

let op = {method: "POST", body: catalog};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
// java.log(response);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';

if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    x.url = buildChapterUrl(x, catalog, device);
    return x;
});
</js>

    let config = (() => {
        try {
            let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
            if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
                cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
                source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
                java.toast("配置初始化完成");
            }
            return cfg;
        } catch(e) {
            let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            return cfg;
        }
    })();

    var sourceVal = '';
    var customSource = '';

    try {
        customSource = (source.getLoginInfoMap())['自定义源站'];
    } catch(e) {
        customSource = '';
    }

    if (customSource !== undefined && customSource !== null && String(customSource).trim() !== "") {
        sourceVal = String(customSource).trim();
    } else if (config.source) {
        sourceVal = config.source;
    }

    var param = sourceVal ? '&source=' + encodeURIComponent(sourceVal) : '';

    result = buildSearchResult(key, param, getServerHost());
}

ruleContent.content:
<js>
// 假设 result 变量已包含 HTML 字符串
var document = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);

var preElements = document.select('div#content-section.content-section > pre');
if (preElements.isEmpty()) {
    result = '未找到 div#content-section.content-section > pre 元素';
} else {
    var preElement = preElements.first();
    var innerHtml = preElement.html();
    
    // 定义转换函数（注意：在 Rhino 中使用 var 或 function）
    function convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(html) {
        var text = html;
        text = text.replaceAll(" ", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*><\\/p>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\\/p>", "\n$1\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<br\\s*\\/?>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("<[^>]+>", "");
        text = text.replaceAll("\\n{3,}", "\n\n");
        return text.trim();
    }
    
    // 调用函数，获取纯文本
    var plainText = convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(innerHtml);
    result = plainText;
}
</js>

<js>
//状态
novelState = [
	{	title: '全部', type: 0},
	{	title: '连载', type: 1},
	{	title: '完结', type: 2}
]
//分类
novelSort = [
	{	title: '　全部　', type: 0},
	{	title: '玄幻奇幻', type: 1},
	{	title: '仙侠武侠', type: 2},
	{	title: '都市言情', type: 3},
	{	title: '穿越历史', type: 4},
	{	title: '科幻灵异', type: 5},
	{	title: '  藏经阁  ', type: 6},
	{	title: '其他类别', type: 7}
]
//排序
novelRank = [
	{ title: '  更新  ', type: 'lastupdate'},
	{ title: '总人气', type: 'allvisit'},
	{ title: '月人气', type: 'monthvisit'},
	{ title: '  字数  ', type: 'size'},
	{ title: '  新书  ', type: 'postdate'}
]

list = [];
formatUrl = (sort, rank, state) => {
	return `{{eval(String(source.loginUrl));_getUrl();}}shuku/${sort}-${rank}-${state}-{{page}}.html`;
}
pushItem = (title, url, basis) => {
	list.push({
		title: title,
		url: url,
		style: {
			layout_flexGrow: 1,
			layout_flexBasisPercent: basis
		}
	});
}

for (stateItem of novelState) {
	pushItem(`🚫小说状态---${stateItem.title}🚫`, "", 1);
	for (rankItem of novelRank) {
		novelSort[0].title = "📫" + rankItem.title;
		for (sortItem of novelSort) {
			pushItem(`${sortItem.title}`, formatUrl(sortItem.type, rankItem.type, stateItem.type), sortItem.type > 5 ? 0.4 : 0.25);
		}
	}
}
JSON.stringify(list);
</js>
header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

for (let i in result) {

bookSourceComment: 增加保存重定向后的域名到源变量，搜索时使用重定向后的域名进行搜索。 换源url时，先在右上角三个点 设置源变量里清空源变量再换源url。 增加自动验证，不行就手动登录，登录url要与源url一致。 解决目前新的字体格式文字显示的问题(例替换显示为'的')。 by812@221012 解决目前所见到的所有问题，包括页面解析、分页有的页面获取不到、图片转文字等问题，并对内容中出现的翻页断行、以前流行的35字换行排版、部分内容显示HTML源码、推广文字、广告等进行了恢复与过滤。 地址发布页(浏览器打开) https://zozozo.xyz/ http://www.diyibanzhu666.xyz 目前可用地址： https://www.6yydstxt226.com/ https://www.6yydstxt434.com/ https://www.6yydstxt426.com/ https://www.7yydstxt234.com/ https://www.5yydstxt178.com/

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

\n?){2}/g,"

bookSourceComment: 增加自动验证，不行就手动登录，登录url要与源url一致。 解决目前新的字体格式文字显示的问题(例替换显示为'的')。 by812@221012 解决目前所见到的所有问题，包括页面解析、分页有的页面获取不到、图片转文字等问题，并对内容中出现的翻页断行、以前流行的35字换行排版、部分内容显示HTML源码、推广文字、广告等进行了恢复与过滤。 效果自认为是不错的，就是慢，巨慢，分页多的章节可能获取文字就要几分钟，毕竟，要做过滤和处理。 凑合用吧兄弟们，后续暂时不准备修改了。 地址发布页(浏览器打开) https://zozozo.xyz/ http://www.diyibanzhu666.xyz 目前可用地址： https://www.1yydstxt234.com https://www.2yydstxt234.com/ https://www.3yydstxt426.com/ https://www.7yydstxt226.com/ https://www.7yydstxt434.com/ https://www.8yydstxt234.com/ https://6yydstxt178.com/ 获取最新可用网址 大家可以根据自己的网络情况选一个最快的来用 替换👉源域名👈链接即可 注意版主一系各站点数据库并非完全同步，所以换了地址之后原有的小说如果追更就需要重新搜索。 建议用复制出来源换个名称再批量改源的方式来做。

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓'){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];


var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓') {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '番薯小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '微山书院', '中华典藏', '老福特'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全面漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '歪瑞古德', 'G社漫画'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马', '旺旺短剧'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Σ最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

<js>
if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
            java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
            html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

             java.log(html);
        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }
    };
    op = JSON.stringify(op);
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia == 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }
    varia = JSON.stringify({
        'custom': varia
    });
    //varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
    java.log(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
    result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
}
result
</js>$.data
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;

if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

             };

        });

    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`

bookSourceComment:
每次使用前登录一下输个1234！每次使用前登录一下输个1234！每次使用前登录一下输个1234！
网站加校验了所以没办法，凑合使吧XD们
解决目前所见到的所有问题，包括页面解析、分页有的页面获取不到、图片转文字等问题，并对内容中出现的翻页断行、以前流行的35字换行排版、部分内容显示HTML源码、推广文字、广告等进行了恢复与过滤。
效果自认为是不错的，就是慢，巨慢，分页多的章节可能获取文字就要几分钟，毕竟要做过滤和处理。
230508微调，增加了网站使用字体进行转码的100个字的处理，改了下一页获取方式，速度么……还是那德性。
前两天才发现挂了，就抽点空搞了搞，没时间细优化了，谁有功夫谁搞吧
翻墙可能用不了，没试。

地址发布页(浏览器打开)
http://www.diyibanzhu666.xyz
https://www.ebay.com/usr/diyib31
获取最新可用网址
替换👉源域名👈链接即可
注意版主一系各站点数据库并非完全同步，所以换了地址之后原有的小说如果追更就需要重新搜索。
建议用复制出来源换个名称再批量改源的方式来做。

bookSourceComment:
① 发布页：https://jmcomicne.net
  
②❗❗❗需要在登录页面获取网址❗❗❗

③ 部分内容需要登录才会显示
  
④ 登录页面点击分流按钮切换站内分流，1，2，3，4代表站内分流线路

⑤ 更改发现排列在登录切换,切换后刷新发现

bookSourceComment:
❗️特别标注：本源只支持洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

搜索分类
@用户
%视频
#专栏
&直播
*番剧
？影视

API来源
https://github.com/SocialSisterYi/bilibili-API-collect

url scheme链接来源
AI和网页

⚙️部分功能说明【自己随便点点点看看吧】
登录使用效果更佳

1、详情页界面 
点击书名显示【最新评论】
长按书名显示【热门评论】

点击UP主名字显示 【视频列表/专栏文集】【根据登录页设置来】
长按UP主名字显示 【视频合集/专栏动态】【根据登录页设置来】

点击 查看全部动态【查看动态】
长按 查看全部动态【搜索该up主动态】

点击右上角◎ 打开哔哩哔哩客户端
点击分享按钮，复制分享详情
点击拷贝书籍详情URL  复制网页链接
点击登录 可选择【关注up到b站 [需登录账号]】

2、视频页
点击右上角◎ 打开推荐视频 【影视无效，直播无效】
点击登录 可点赞投币收藏

3、发现页
长按书源选项后打开登录页面，可筛选分类

4、正文页
视频/文章图可点击跳转
🔗📖🎥👤图标可点击跳转
exploreUrl:
<js>
try{
let all = [];
let 展开符 = "↓ ";
let 收起符 = "↑ ";
let 占位符 = "※"
let 启用占位 = true   //是：true,否：false
//一行个数
let numy = 3;

let d = {
    1: 1,
    2: 0.4,
    3: 0.25,
    4: 0.2,
    5: 0.15,
    7: 0.1,
    10: 0.05
};

let num = d[numy];
let push = (title, url, num, g,action) =>{
	let j = {
    title: title,
    url: url,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: g == 0 ? g : 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: num
    }
  }
     if(action){
         j.action = action.action;
         j.name = action.name;
         j.type = action.type;
         j.chars = action.chars;
         j.viewName = action.viewName;
         j.default = action.default;      
     }     
     all.push(j)	
} 

function zwf(len,numy,num){
	if(len%numy!==0){
        let n = len % numy;
        let p = numy-n;
      
        for(let i=0;i<p;i++){
            push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
        }
    }
}
let navdata = java.ajax("https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav")
let mid = JSON.parse(navdata)?.data?.mid || "";
let searchOrder = changeSearch();

push("搜索类型", "", searchOrder.length?0.4:1,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索类型'],'searchselect');changeSearch()",
        "chars":["🏷综合","👤用户","🎥视频","📖专栏","🎞影视","📽番剧","📺直播"],
        "default": Map("searchselect")||"综合"
    });
    
    
    if(searchOrder.length){
    push("搜索排序", "", 0.4,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索排序'],'searchorder')",
        "chars":searchOrder,
        "default": Map("searchorder")||"综合排序"
    });
    }
    push("搜索关键词", "",d["2"],1,{
        "type": "text",
        "viewName":"'搜索关键词： '+Map('searchk')",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索关键词'],'searchk',1)",
        "default":Map("searchk")
    });
    push("🔍搜索", "", d["5"],1,{
    	    "action":"toSearch()",   
        "type": "button"       
    });
push("👤我的", "", 1);
push("推送视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/index/top/feed/rcmd", num);
push("热门视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular?pn={\{page}}", num);
push("入站必刷", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular/precious", num);

if (mid) {
    push("正在直播", "https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-ucenter/v1/xfetter/GetWebList?hit_ab=true", num);

    push("专栏动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=article&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("视频动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=video&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("dnextoffset","")};source.get("dnextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("历史记录", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/history/cursor?max={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}`, num);
    if(启用占位){
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    }
push("⚙️关注分组", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['⚙️关注分组'],'follows')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("follows")||展开符
});

if(isShow('follows',展开符)){
        push("全部", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/followings?vmid="+mid+"&pn={\{page}}",num);
        关注分组url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tags";
        关注分组data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(关注分组url));
        (关注分组data?.data ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.name, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tag?pn={{page}\}&tagid=${x.tagid}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((关注分组data?.data ?? []).length+1,numy,num):null
    }

push("🗂收藏夹", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['🗂收藏夹'],'favse')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("favse")||展开符
});
if(isShow('favse',展开符)){
        收藏夹url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/folder/created/list-all?up_mid=" + mid;
        收藏夹data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(收藏夹url));
        (收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.title, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/resource/list?media_id=${x.id}&ps=20&pn={\{page}}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).length,numy,num):null
    }
}
let 分区 = ["动画::1005", "游戏::1008", "鬼畜::1007", "音乐::1003", "舞蹈::1004", "影视::1001", "娱乐::1002", "知识::1010", "科技数码::1012", "资讯::1009", "美食::1020", "小剧场::1021", "汽车::1013", "时尚美妆::1014", "体育运动::1018", "动物::1024", "vlog::1029", "绘画::1006", "人工智能::1011", "家装房产::1015", "户外潮流::1016", "健身::1017", "手工::1019", "旅游出行::1022", "三农::1023", "亲子::1025", "健康::1026", "情感::1027", "生活兴趣::1030", "生活经验::1031", "神秘学::1028"];

push("📽视频分区", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['📽视频分区'],'videofq')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("videofq")||展开符
});

if(isShow('videofq',展开符)){
分区.forEach(x => {
    let a = x.split("::");
    let json = `{display_id:page,request_cnt:20,from_region:${a[1]},device:"web",web_location:333.40138}`
    push(a[0], `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/region/feed/rcmd?{\{getWbiEnc(${json})}}`, num)
});
启用占位?zwf(分区.length,numy,num):null
}

function getUrl(st = -1, sv = -1, area = -1, is_finish = -1, cr = -1, ss = -1, year = -1, rd = -1, sid = -1, pid = -1, order = -1) {
    return `https://api.bilibili.com/pgc/season/index/result?season_type=${st}&type=1&page={\{page}}&pagesize=50&season_version=${sv}&area=${area}&is_finish=${is_finish}&copyright=${cr}&season_status=${ss}&year=${java.encodeURI(year)}&release_date=${java.encodeURI(rd)}&style_id=${sid}&producer_id=${pid}&order=${order}`
}

push("视频类型","","1",1,{      
        "type": "select",
        "chars": [ "🎬番剧","🎥电影","🎞纪录片","🇨🇳国创","📺电视剧","🍿综艺"],
        "default": Map("videolx")||"🎬番剧",
        "action":"show(infoMap['视频类型'],'videolx')"
 });
 
 push("🔁排序","",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",        
            "chars": ["更新时间", "弹幕数量", "播放数量","追剧人数","最高评分","开播时间","上映时间"],
            "default": Map("order")||"追剧人数",
            "action":"show(infoMap['🔁排序'],'order')",
});
push("💰付费","",d["2"],1,{        	   
            "type": "select",       
            "chars": ["全部", "免费","付费", "大会员"],
            "default": Map("pay")||"全部",
            "action":"show(infoMap['💰付费'],'pay')"
})
        
function createFilterFromData(typeKey, namePrefix, fenleiData, f, icon) {
    const dataArray = [];
    (fenleiData[f] ?? []).forEach(x => {
        dataArray.push(x.n);
    });
    if (dataArray.length) {
        push(icon + namePrefix,"",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",
            "chars": dataArray,
            "default": Map(icon + namePrefix) || "全部",
            "action":`show(infoMap['${icon + namePrefix}'],'${icon + namePrefix}')`
        });
    }
}

    let videolx = String(Map("videolx"))?String(Map("videolx")):"🎬番剧";
    let icon = videolx.match(/^([^\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)/)[1];
    let f = videolx.match(/([\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)$/)[1];
    
    createFilterFromData("出品", "出品", fenlei["出品"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("状态", "状态", fenlei["状态"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("版权", "版权", fenlei["版权"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("类别", "类别", fenlei["类别"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("地区", "地区", fenlei["地区"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("年份", "年份", fenlei["年份"], f, icon);
    
    let ss = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "付费", String(Map('pay')));
    let order = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "排序", String(Map('order')), null);
    let area = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "地区", String(Map(icon + "地区")));
    let sv = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "类别", String(Map(icon + "类别")));
    let is_finish = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "状态", String(Map(icon + "状态")));
    let cr = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "版权", String(Map(icon + "版权")));
    let year = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    let pid = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "出品", String(Map(icon + "出品")));
    let rd = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    
    let st = fenlei["类型v"][fenlei["类型"].indexOf(f)];
    fenlei["风格"][f].forEach(y => {
        let url = getUrl(st, sv, area, is_finish, cr, ss, year, rd, y.v, pid, order);
        push(y.n, url, num)
    });
    启用占位?zwf(fenlei["风格"][f].length,numy,num):null
    
    result = JSON.stringify(all)
    
}catch(e){
	java.log(e)
	java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\n请安装后重新导入书源");	java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download", "下载阅读Σ最新测试版");
	
	result = `下载阅读Σ::{\{java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}`;
	}
</js>

 if(!S("$.data") && /api/.test(baseUrl)){

}catch(e){}

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>

let b = String(book.bookUrl);
let bmid = S("$.data.mid||$.data.list.mid||$.data.item.basic.uid||$.data.item.modules.module_author.mid||$.data.owner.mid||$.data.root.mid");
let bookintro = String(book.intro);
book.putVariable("mid", bmid);
cache.put("mid",bmid);

caid = String(cache.get("aid"));	cache.put("aid",S("$.result.main_section.episodes[0].aid"));

book.putVariable("id",S("$.data.item.basic.comment_id_str"));
getMode();

if (/web-interface\/view|series|season_id=|acc\/info/.test(b)) {
    if (/音频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 32;
    } else if (/视频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 4;
    }
} else if (/article/.test(b)) {
    book.type = 8;
}

if (/web-interface\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    var p = JSON.parse(result).data;
    book.putVariable("mid", p.owner.mid);
    var d = [];
    var aid = p.aid;
    
    if (p.pages.length == 1) {
        cid = p.pages[0].cid;
        d.push({
            title: p.title,
            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+p.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
            pubdate: p.pubdate,
            desc: formatTimeDynamic(p.duration)
        });
    } else if (p.pages.length > 1) {
        p.pages.forEach(item => {
            cid = item.cid;
            d.push({
                title: item.part===""?"无名":item.part,
                desc: formatTimeDynamic(item.duration),
                url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+item.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
                pubdate: item.pubdate,

            })
        })
    }
    if (p.ugc_season) {
        d.unshift({
            title: "当前视频",
            vol: 1
        });

        let s = p.ugc_season.sections;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          s= s.reverse();
                    }
                    d.push({
                        title:"视频合集",
                        vol:1
                    });
                      
                    
        s.forEach(el=> {
            if(s.length>1){
            d.push({
                        title: "🎥 "+ el.title+"【"+el.episodes.length+"个视频】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+el.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
               }
                    ep = el.episodes;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          ep = ep.reverse();
                    }
               ep.forEach((x,i) => {
                     if(x.bvid === p.bvid){
                        d[0].title = d[0].title+ "  "+(i+1)+"/" +el.episodes.length+"【"+el.title+"】"+x.title
                    }
                if (x.pages.length == 1) {
                    d.push({
                        title:(i+1)+"🏷 "+ x.title+" ",
                        url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + (x.pages[0] ? x.pages[0].cid : x.cid))},{"type":""}`,
                        pubdate: x.arc.pubdate,
                        desc: formatTimeDynamic(x.arc.duration)
                    });
                }

                if (x.pages.length > 1) {
                     d.push({
                        title: (i+1)+" 📖 "+ x.title+"【"+x.pages.length+"P】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+x.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
                    x.pages.forEach((y,j)=> {
                        d.push({
                            title: (i+1)+"-" +(j+1)+"🏷 "+y.part,
                            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + y.cid)},{"type":""}`,
                            pubdate: y?.arc?.pubdate ?? x?.arc?.pubdate ??"",
                            desc: formatTimeDynamic(y?.arc.duration ?? y.duration) + " "+x.title
                        });
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    }
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/reply\/reply/.test(baseUrl)) {
    if(JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid){
        book.putVariable("mid", JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid);
    }
} else if (/x\/article\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    book.putVariable("mid", S("$.data.author.mid"));
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        "title": S("$.data.title"),
        "url": getApi("article",S("$.data.id"),S("$.data.dyn_id_str"))
    }])
} else if (/acc\/info/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let name = S("$.data.name");
    let mid = S("$.data.mid");
    let d = [];
    let roomid = S("$.data.live_room.roomid");
    
    let liveStatus = S("$.data.live_room.liveStatus");
    if (liveStatus == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🔴";
        java.toast("【" + name + "】正在直播");
        java.log("【" + name + "】正在直播");
    } else if (liveStatus == "0") {
        liveStatus = "⚪️"
    }
    if (S("$.data.live_room.roundStatus") == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🟢"
    }
    let title = S("$.data.live_room.title");
    
    if (/🔴|🟢/.test(liveStatus)) {
        result = java.ajax("https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-room/v2/index/getRoomPlayInfo?room_id="+roomid+"&protocol=0,1&format=0,1,2&codec=0,1&qn=30000");
        let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
        let stream = data.playurl_info?.playurl?.stream;
        
        if(stream){
            let codec = stream[0].format[0].codec[0];
            let base_url = codec.base_url;
            let accept_qn = codec.accept_qn;
            accept_qn.forEach(code=>{
                d.push({
                    title:getVideoQuality(code),
                    vol:true
                });
               
                    codec.url_info.forEach((u,i)=>{
                         if(codec.current_qn==code){
                             let host = u.host;
                             let extra = u.extra;
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(host+base_url+extra+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }else{
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(i+"&"+code+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }
                  })
              })
             
          }else if(data.playurl_info == null){
              d.push({
                  title: (liveStatus+"直播已结束【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                  url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
          }
      }else {
        d.push({
            title: (liveStatus+"【" + title + "】" + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    
   
   /*
  //  直接获取视频流
    if (/中/.test(liveStatus)) {
        let liveApi = "https://api.live.bilibili.com/room/v1/Room/playUrl?qn=30000&cid=" + roomid;
        let data = java.ajax(liveApi);
        let durl = JSON.parse(data).data.durl;
        durl.forEach((x,i) => {
        	java.log(durl.length-1-i)
            d.push({
                title: "线路" + x.order,
                vol: true
            }, {
                title: (x.order + "、【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(durl[durl.length-1-i].url)},{type:"live"}`
            })
        })
    } else {
        d.push({
            title: ("【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(roomid+"&"+mid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    */
   
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/data:dynamic_type|opus\/detail|v1\/detail/.test(baseUrl)) {
    
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        title:String(book.name),
        url:baseUrl
    }])
}
result

</js>

let replaceCover = (u) => {
    if (u.startsWith("https://")) u = u.substring(8)
    else u = u.substring(7)
    let uArr = u.split("/")
    uArr[0] = "https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin"

    uArr.forEach((x) => {
        if (!x.includes("?") && !x.includes("~")) uArr2.push(x)
        else uArr2.push(x.split("~")[0])
    })
    u = uArr2.join("/")
    return u
}

  let list = [];

    data = resultData.book_shelf_info;
    if (data != null) {
    let requestData = { books: [] };
    for (let i in data) {
      requestData["books"].push({
        book_id: data[i]["book_id"],
        item_id: "0",
      });
    }
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(resultData.book_shelf_info))
    let booksData = java.ajax(
      'https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{method: "post",body: ' +
        JSON.stringify(requestData) +
        "}"
    );
    // java.log(booksData)
    let books =  JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
      let d = books[i];
      list.push({
        src: d,
        book_name: d.book_name,
        thumb_url: replaceCover(d.thumb_url),
        abstract: d.abstract,
        book_id: d.book_id,
      });
    }
    }
  } else list = JSON.parse(result)[0].content
  JSON.stringify(list)
